tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Golden light on my skin tonight
We're running through the summer wild
Every heartbeat feels like a sign
That everything is perfectly aligned

[Pre-Chorus]
Don't let this moment slip away
We've got forever in a day

[Chorus]
Feel the euphoria rising high
Dancing underneath the summer sky
We're alive we're on fire tonight
Summer never felt so right
Euphoria

[Verse 2]
Barefoot on the midnight sand
Stars above like a promised land
Your laughter echoes through the breeze
This summer sets our spirits free

[Chorus]
Feel the euphoria rising high
Dancing underneath the summer sky
We're alive we're on fire tonight
Summer never felt so right
Euphoria

[Bridge]
Every sunset every wave
Every memory we made
I'll remember this forever
Golden days that last forever

[Outro]
Euphoria... euphoria...
(fade)

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
3 AM and the city sleeps
I'm drowning in these midnight streets
Neon shadows on my face
Running from a hollow place

[Pre-Chorus]
They don't know the weight I carry
Every step feels solitary

[Chorus]
Midnight in my veins
Can't wash away the stains
I'm lost in the dark parade
But I won't be afraid
I won't be afraid

[Verse 2]
Phone lights up but I let it ring
Got nothing left to give this thing
Smoke rises like a prayer untold
This concrete jungle getting cold

[Chorus]
Midnight in my veins
Can't wash away the stains
I'm lost in the dark parade
But I won't be afraid
I won't be afraid

[Bridge]
Maybe in another life
I'll find the peace beneath the fight

[Outro]
I won't be afraid...
(fade)

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Plug it in and turn it loud
Feedback screaming through the crowd
We don't need your algorithm life
We've got guitars and we've got the night

[Pre-Chorus]
Break the screen break the mold
Rock and roll is taking hold

[Chorus]
We're the static in the signal
We're the noise they can't control
Turn the amps up to eleven
Rock is back to save your soul
Save your soul

[Verse 2]
Basement shows and blown-out speakers
Living loud for the true believers
No producers no machines
Just three chords and a dream

[Chorus]
We're the static in the signal
We're the noise they can't control
Turn the amps up to eleven
Rock is back to save your soul
Save your soul

[Bridge]
They said rock was dead
But we never left
We were underground
Now we're taking our breath

[Outro]
Save your soul!
(guitar feedback fade)

tracks.news_event: FIFA World Cup 2026 kicks off at Estadio Azteca, Mexico City — June 11, 2026. Mexico vs South Africa opening match. Shakira, Burna Boy, J Balvin perform at opening ceremony.
tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
From Mexico City to the northern lights
A billion hearts beat as one tonight
Every flag unfurled every anthem sung
This is where legends have begun

[Pre-Chorus]
Todos unidos one dream
The beautiful game sets us free

[Chorus]
Light up the world light up the sky
Tonight we rise tonight we fly
From every corner of the earth we came
United by the beautiful game
Vamos the world is ours tonight

[Verse 2]
Azteca roars with a thousand drums
The streets are alive hear the people come
Samba meets sones K-pop meets soul
Football makes us whole

[Chorus]
Light up the world light up the sky
Tonight we rise tonight we fly
From every corner of the earth we came
United by the beautiful game
Vamos the world is ours tonight

[Bridge]
El mundo es uno the world is one
Beneath the summer sun
We play we dream we never stop
Until we reach the top

[Outro]
The world is ours tonight...
Vamos...
(stadium chants fade)

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1 — Spanish/Quechua]
Inti raymi sol sagrado
Desde las cumbres del Cusco al cielo estrellado
Pachamama tierra bendita
Tu voz antigua en la quena vibra

[Instrumental Break — quena flute solo]

[Chorus — English]
Mountains whisper ancient songs
Where the condor flies and the river runs long
Andes rising to the sky
Peru your spirit will never die

[Verse 2 — Spanish]
Charango canta en el viento frío
Las terrazas de Moray guardan su misterio
Zampoña suena en el amanecer
Los Andes nunca dejan de crecer

[Instrumental Break — charango solo]

[Chorus — English]
Mountains whisper ancient songs
Where the condor flies and the river runs long
Andes rising to the sky
Peru your spirit will never die

[Outro — Quechua]
Pachamama... Inti raymi...
Kawsayninchik... nuestra vida...
(quena fading into wind)
